case_title: ALICJA WODZICKI VS. GABRIEL MAY ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WODZICKI, ALICJA AS TO DEFENDANT MAY, GABRIEL MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-23-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALICIA WODZICKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIEL MAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MID-CENTURY INSURANCE CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STETSON DIRCKS. RESPONDENT MERCURY INSURANCE CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FRED SALAZAR. MID-CENTURY INCURANCE AND MERCURY INSURANCE BOTH STATED THEY ARE READY TO RESOLVE THIS MATTER WITH THE PLAINTIFF. ALL PARTIES STIPULATED TO A CONTINUANCE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
